display.purpose: Wordmark and primary headings — the painted shop sign. Landing hero scales up from here.

title.purpose: Panel and card titles — serif kept small to hold warmth in dense UI.

body.purpose: All running copy, form values, table cells.

label.purpose: Field-group labels, eyebrows, role tags — 10–11px, +0.09em, uppercase.

mono.purpose: Order numbers, voucher codes, AWB — read character by character.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Standard focused-input affordance; 3px variant on larger controls.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Notification panel, dropdowns floating above the page.

shadows.name: sidebar
shadows.purpose: Quiet lift of the sticky sidebar rail.

shadows.name: sticky-bar
shadows.purpose: Mobile sticky checkout/submit bar lifting from the bottom edge.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default duration for hover/colour state changes (background, border, color).

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Active press feedback; primary buttons scale(0.99).

motion.name: ease-out-recommended
motion.purpose: Recommended ease-out for new motion; current build defaults to browser ease — no bounce/elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main commit action — submit order, save settings, apply voucher.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #F2EAE0; background: #7A1028; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #550A1A; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.99); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost / Add Button
components.description: Low-emphasis additive action — add a product row, add a field.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #7A4F55; background: #FBF6F0; border: 1px dashed #C9A090; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #7A1028; color: #7A1028; background: #F5E6E8; }

components.name: Pill Toggle
components.description: Language / account / segmented toggle. Active state takes the oxblood fill.
components.css: .ds-pill-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-pill { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #7A4F55; background: #FBF6F0; border: 1px solid #C9A090; border-radius: 20px; padding: 5px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-pill:hover { border-color: #7A1028; color: #7A1028; } .ds-pill.active { background: #7A1028; color: #F2EAE0; border-color: #7A1028; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field — cream fill, clay border, oxblood focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #2B0A10; background: #F2EAE0; border: 1.5px solid #C9A090; border-radius: 10px; padding: 7px 10px; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #A07070; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #7A1028; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(122,16,40,0.1); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Order status indicator — one of six semantic colours; shown here as Pending.
components.css: .ds-status { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; } .ds-status-pending { background: #C3E6CB; color: #155724; } .ds-status-confirmed { background: #D1ECF1; color: #0C5460; } .ds-status-preparing { background: #E8D5F5; color: #5A1A7A; } .ds-status-ready { background: #FFF3CD; color: #856404; } .ds-status-completed { background: #EDE4D8; color: #4A3020; } .ds-status-cancelled { background: #F8D7DA; color: #721C24; }

components.name: Panel / Card
components.description: Content panel — raised surface, clay hairline border, no resting shadow.
components.html:
Shop settings

Configure shipping, payment and notifications.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #FBF6F0; border: 1.5px solid #C9A090; border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-panel-title { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #7A1028; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; color: #7A4F55; margin: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Merchant/admin rail item — oxblood left-marker and sliding arrow on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #EDE4D8; border-radius: 20px; padding: 0.75rem 0; overflow: hidden; width: 210px; } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 13px 1.25rem; border: none; background: none; color: #4A2530; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item::after { content: '→'; margin-left: auto; color: #C9A090; transition: transform 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 20%; bottom: 20%; width: 3px; background: #7A1028; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; transform: scaleY(0); transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #DDD0C4; color: #7A1028; } .ds-nav-item:hover::after { color: #7A1028; transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-nav-item:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-nav-item.active { background: #F5E6E8; color: #7A1028; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item.active::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-nav-item.active::after { color: #7A1028; }

components.name: Order Number Stamp
components.description: Signature receipt stamp — the only monospace in customer UI.
components.css: .ds-order-stamp { font-family: 'DM Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #7A1028; }

narrative.overview: BiteTime is a small food shop's signage made digital. The wordmark and headings are set in Lora — a humanist serif that reads like painted shop lettering — on warm cream surfaces the colour of unbleached paper and pastry. The signature colour is oxblood (#7A1028): a deep, confident wine-red borrowed from awnings and a stamped receipt, never bright or fast-food-loud. The system works by tonal layering, not decoration: depth comes from stepping warm neutrals separated by 1.5px clay strokes, not from shadows or gradients. Type carries the warmth; the background stays quietly committed to its warm hue. It explicitly rejects the generic SaaS dashboard and corporate fintech — even the merchant and admin screens stay on this warm palette.
keyCharacteristics: Oxblood-on-cream identity, warm through and through — operational screens included
Lora serif signage paired with DM Sans body on a serif/sans contrast axis
Flat surfaces, tonal warm-neutral layering, 1.5px clay hairline borders
Soft pill geometry (20px) and gentle tinted hover states
Full EN / 中文 parity as a structural constraint, not a translation layer

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Oxblood is the only brand accent. It does not compete with a second saturated colour — gold is functional (tracking) and the semantic set is reserved for status. If a screen has two accents fighting, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Warm-Floor Rule
rules.body: No surface is cooler than its hue allows. Every neutral steps along the cream→taupe ladder; never reach for a grey. A cool neutral reads instantly as the SaaS default the brand rejects.

rules.name: The Serif-Signage Rule
rules.body: Lora is for names and headings — the shop's lettering. It never sets body copy, form labels, or table data; that is always DM Sans.

rules.name: The Modest-Display Rule
rules.body: Display tops out around the landing hero; everywhere else serif stays small (≤26px). Warmth comes from the typeface, not from shouting size. Keep display letter-spacing ≥ -0.02em.

rules.name: The Flat-Rest Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has a border and a tonal step, never a drop shadow. Shadows answer only to 'this floats' (popover, sticky, modal, focus), never to 'this is a card.'

dos: Do keep oxblood (#7A1028) as the single brand voice; hover to #550A1A, never a second resting accent.
Do build depth from the warm surface ladder (sunken #EDE4D8 → cream #F2EAE0 → raised #FBF6F0 → high #FFFDF9) plus 1.5px clay borders. Step the colour, don't add a shadow.
Do set names and headings in Lora, everything else in DM Sans.
Do keep body copy on ink (#2B0A10) or rose-muted (#7A4F55), and tertiary text on text-tertiary (#8A5550) — all clear AA on cream. clay-muted (#A07070) is borders/icons only.
Do carry the warm palette into merchant and admin screens — an order table is still hospitable.
Do hold every layout at both EN and 中文 string lengths; provide a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for the nav slide and any entrance.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no cold blue/grey panels, no hero-metric template, no endless identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't drift toward corporate fintech: no navy-and-gold, no sterile institutional polish, nothing transactional or cold.
Don't reach for a cool grey neutral (#EEE, #F5F5F5, slate). Every neutral lives on the cream→taupe ladder.
Don't set any text in clay-muted (#A07070) or clay-border (#C9A090) — they fail AA on cream; tertiary text goes on text-tertiary (#8A5550).
Don't use gold (#C9A030) anywhere but shipment/tracking, or let serif set body copy, table data, or form labels.
Don't add gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or a near-white cream standing in for committed colour.
